backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (School, Teacher, Student, Result, UserProfile) and CRUD operations with role-based access control for a school result management system. Includes counters and in-memory maps for all entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (auth system, sidebar navigation, home page stats, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries for four frontend files: App.tsx, ProgressReportPage, StudentResultPrintPage, and TeacherManagePage.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, charts, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Vidyarthi Online Nikal 2026' with a root div and a module script entry point to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in AuthProvider, renders LoginPage when unauthenticated, and routes between eight dashboard pages with role-based navigation guards.
frontend/src/components/ReportCard.tsx: Printable report card component that displays school info, student details, and semester 1 and 2 subject grades in Devanagari-labeled tables with additional assessment fields.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing session-based authentication with typed admin, teacher, and student session shapes, persisted to sessionStorage, with login and logout callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (useQuery/useMutation) for CRUD operations on schools, teachers, students, results, and teacher logins, all backed by localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with custom OKLCH color tokens for light/dark themes, defines gradient utilities, and includes print styles.
frontend/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx: Responsive dashboard shell with a collapsible sidebar, role-based navigation items (admin/teacher/student), user info display, and a logout button.
frontend/src/lib/localStorage.ts: Utility module providing typed localStorage get/set/remove helpers, data interfaces (SchoolExtra, TeacherExtra, StudentExtra, ResultExtra, TeacherLogin), CRUD functions, and auto-incrementing ID counters for each entity.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/EnterResultPage.tsx: Page for entering, editing, and deleting student semester results, with subject grade selectors and per-semester fields for special progress, hobby, and improvement notes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Dashboard home page displaying summary statistics (total students, results entered/pending) and a progress bar, filtered by role (admin sees all schools, teacher sees own school).
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with three tabs for admin (username/password), teacher (mobile number), and student (UDISE + class details) authentication flows.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressReportPage.ts: Page to search and display a student's progress report card by filtering on UDISE, class, division, and attendance number, with print and HTML download options.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolInfoPage.tsx: CRUD management page for school records, displaying schools in a table and providing add/edit dialogs and delete confirmation for school entries.
frontend/src/pages/StudentInfoPage.tsx: CRUD page for managing student records, with a table listing students and a dialog form that auto-populates school and teacher details based on selected UDISE and teacher name.
frontend/src/pages/StudentResultPrintPag: Page for searching and displaying a student's report card by UDISE, class, division, and attendance number, with print and HTML download functionality; auto-searches for users with the student role.
frontend/src/pages/TeacherInfoPage.tsx: CRUD page for managing teacher records, with a table and dialog form that auto-fills school name, taluka, and district from the selected UDISE code.
frontend/src/pages/TeacherManagePage.tsx: Admin-only page for managing teacher login credentials (UDISE + mobile number pairs), with a table and dialog for adding, editing, and deleting entries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers for persisting values to sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, Devanagari/Poppins fonts, custom shadows, and fade-in/slide-in animations, using typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for 'Vidyarthi Online Nikal 2026', a Marathi school result management app, including architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and image requirements.
